name: Evolutionary Genomics, Inc.
summary: Evolutionary Genomics, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and identification of positively selected genes in humans, animals, and commercial crops. The company develops Adapted Traits Platform, a technology platform to identify genes for enhancing crop plant traits, such as yield, sugar content, biomass, drought tolerance, and pest/disease resistance. It serves governmental organizations, non-profit foundations, and commercial entities. Evolutionary Genomics, Inc. was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Castle Rock, Colorado.
